semantic.role: Defines naming conventions and coding standards for the ArchSpine monorepo codebase.
responsibilities: Documenting interface naming rules (prefix 'I') for type definition files
Documenting test file naming rules (suffix .test.ts or .spec.ts)
Establishing severity levels for convention violations
Providing rationale for each naming rule
outOfScope: General coding style guidelines (e.g., indentation, formatting)

English.purpose: This document establishes mandatory naming conventions to ensure codebase consistency across the ArchSpine monorepo, reducing cognitive overhead and improving maintainability.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project, particularly those working in the types/ and tests/ directories. The rules help maintain a uniform code style in a large-scale monorepo environment.
key_takeaways: Internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must use the 'I' prefix (e.g., IUserRepository)
Test files in tests/** must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts
Violations of test file naming are treated as errors; interface naming violations are warnings
Each rule includes a clear rationale to guide developer understanding

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档规定了强制性的命名规范，以确保 ArchSpine 单体仓库中代码风格的一致性，降低认知负担并提高可维护性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于所有为 ArchSpine 项目贡献代码的开发者，特别是那些在 types/ 和 tests/ 目录下工作的开发者。这些规则有助于在大型单体仓库环境中维护统一的代码风格。
key_takeaways: src/types/**/*.ts 中的内部接口必须使用 'I' 前缀（例如 IUserRepository）
tests/** 中的测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾
测试文件命名违规被视为错误；接口命名违规为警告
每条规则都附有明确的原因说明，以帮助开发者理解
